results.title: Lionel Messi makes 200th international appearance during Argentina vs Algeria FIFA World Cup 2026 match
results.description: Messi is now only the third player to reach the 200-match landmark in international football, after Portugal’s Cristiano Ronaldo (228) and Kuwait’s Bader Al-Mutawa (202).

results.title: Lionel Messi becomes first player to play in six FIFA World Cups
results.description: The Argentine icon first featured in the 2006 World Cup and has featured in all subsequent editions. Messi has played 26 World Cup games, scoring 13 goals and providing eight assists.
